evidence: standards/brain/patterns/VIP.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A literal remains inline only when it is not user-facing or the product explicitly requires locale-specific variants for that identifier or configuration value.
statement: Classify string literals before localization: user-facing copy uses the localization system, while URLs, identifiers, keys, event names, and configuration values remain literal unless product requirements make them locale-dependent.
